description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow enclosed by a dark perimeter fence, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The front facade opens onto a landscaped yard with two palm trees and a rectangular swimming pool, flanked by a paved lounging area with sunbeds. The structure is primarily composed of smooth, neutral-toned materials, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing views and access to the pool area. The rear and side elevations are more private, with fewer and smaller windows, and the property is accented by several ornamental trees, including two with pink foliage. The main entrance is set back under a covered porch, providing shelter and a welcoming transition from the exterior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a pool, palm trees, and a fenced yard, featuring large windows and a covered porch. The design is minimalist and emphasizes open, outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, sunbeds, palm trees, and the main facade with large windows and a covered porch.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and ornamental trees with pink foliage near the front gate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the more private side of the bungalow with fewer windows and the perimeter fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the pool area, covered porch, and the open connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
